HomePage.title: ANTHI-FYTA KALOUDIS
HomePage.subtitle: Landscaping Services
HomePage.heroHeadline: Flowers, Plants & Landscaping Services in Ilioupoli
HomePage.heroSubheadline: From wedding decoration to garden design — trust the experts

About.title: About Us
About.description1: Kaloudis is a well-known florist in the Ilioupoli area, offering a wide variety of flowers and plants suitable for every occasion. We emphasize high aesthetic quality and excellent customer service.
About.description2: We provide floral decoration services for weddings, baptisms and receptions, creating original compositions. We also offer a rich collection of indoor and outdoor plants, as well as complete landscaping services.
About.qualityDesc: Service with a smile, honesty and dedication to every customer
About.varietyDesc: From fresh cut flowers to rare plants and carnivorous species

Gallery.title: Our Shop
Gallery.subtitle: Photos from our flower shop and our work

Showcase.title: What We Offer
Showcase.productsDescription: Wide variety of flowers, plants and garden supplies
Showcase.servicesDescription: Complete landscaping services for every need

Products.title: Our Products
Products.flowersDesc: Fresh flowers, indoor and outdoor plants, rare species and carnivorous plants
Products.soilDesc: Specialized soils and substrates for every type of plant
Products.fertilizersDesc: Quality fertilizers for healthy growth and rich blooming
Products.potsDesc: Pots in every size and style, from classic to modern

Services.title: Our Services
Services.subtitle: Complete solutions for your garden and outdoor spaces
Services.baptismsDesc: Church and reception decoration with fresh flowers in any style
Services.maintenanceDesc: Regular care of gardens, balconies and outdoor areas
Services.irrigationDesc: Installation and maintenance of automatic watering systems
Services.pruningDesc: Professional tree and shrub pruning for health and aesthetics
Services.tallTreesDesc: Safe cutting and removal of tall trees with specialized equipment
Services.rockGardensDesc: Design and construction of stunning rock gardens
Services.gardenDesignDesc: Complete garden study and design tailored to your needs
Services.landClearingDesc: Clearing and preparation of plots and undeveloped areas
Services.pestControlDesc: Plant protection in collaboration with a specialized agronomist
